title: [codereview1] coap_dtn.c after buffer addition: missing rate limit using CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_DEADDROP_MAX_MESSAGES
description: Rate limit not implemented with atomics/timer per Kconfig comment. s_dtn_buffer added but not used in handlers or init. P2.
close_reason: added rate limit with CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_DEADDROP_MAX_MESSAGES using atomics, init DTN buffer, provider callbacks fixed, no comments added
